productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Navy Blue Check Shorts
description: CompositionNavy blue, green and white plaid check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides with a small coin pocket over the right pocket, buttoned flap pockets on the legs and back, comfortable waist with loops, and has a buttoned and zipper fly in the frontFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsPlaid checks in navy blue, green and white gives a vacation vibe to these shorts from united colors of benetton. The insert pockets on the sides and buttoned flap pockets on the back are utilitarian. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this shorts with t-shirts in solid colours and sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
